text.title: Reasoning-First Architectures — Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: code-review router escalates only "hard" PRs to Claude Extended Thinking; easy PRs stay on Sonnet.

example.title: reasoning-routing.yaml for code-review
example.code:
version: 1.0.0
classifier: model: claude-haiku prompt_version: cr-classifier-v3 confidence_field: difficulty_score
task_types: code_review_simple: route: standard standard_fallback: {model: claude-sonnet-4-5, trigger: always} thinking_budget: 0
code_review_hard: route: extended-thinking thinking_budget: 8192 standard_fallback: model: claude-sonnet-4-5 trigger: provider_unhealthy
architecture_planning: route: o3 thinking_budget: 32768 standard_fallback: {model: gpt-4o, trigger: budget_cap_hit}
eval_evidence: set_path: evals/cr-routing-2026-05.jsonl sample_size: 78 reasoning_lift: code_review_hard: 0.18 # +18% pass rate vs standard architecture_planning: 0.31
budget_cap: monthly_usd: 3500 on_cap_hit: fall-through
human_gate: enabled: true actions: [deploy, db-migration, payment] confidence_floor: 0.65 # below p10 of eval distribution → human
example.note: Demonstrates: classifier-first (r3), per-bucket budget (r2), eval evidence ≥50 with positive lift (r1), fall-through on cap (r5), human gate on irreversible (r4).
